items: Public Comment on Closed Session Items Only
Discussion/Action Public Employee Complaint- Consider request to hear complaint against district employee (Gov. Code § 54957)
Reconvene to Open Session at approximately 7:00 PM
Report Out on Closed Session from February 11, 2026
Presentation on the Local Control Accountability Plan (LCAP) Mid Year Report
Review of Draft Resolution: Calling An Election, Establishing Specifications Of The Election Order, And Requesting Consolidation With Other Elections Occurring On June 2, 2026
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Seneca Family of Agencies, to provide Non-Public School (NPS) for the 2025-2026 School Year
Acceptance of the Zero Emission School Bus and Infrastructure (ZESBI) Summary of Award and Approval of the Incentive Recipient Agreement
Ratification of Warrant Registers, January 1, 2026 – January 31, 2026
Submission of 2026 California School Boards Association (CSBA) Delegate Assembly Nominations
Adoption of Resolution No. 17, Reduction or Elimination of Certificated Services for Fiscal Year 2025-2026
Adoption of Resolution No. 18, Release and Reassignment of Certificated Administrator(s)
Adoption of Resolution No. 19, Determination of Order of Employment for Certificated Employees for Elimination of or Reductions in Particular Kinds of Services for Fiscal Year 2025-2026
Adoption of Resolution No. 20, Reduction of Certain Classified Services for Fiscal Year 2025-2026
Approval of Non-Reelection of Certificated Probationary Personnel
Approval of Release of Temporary Teachers
Approval of Personnel Changes for the 2025-2026 School Year
Receipt of Governing Board’s Initial Proposal for Negotiations with Redwood City Teachers Association for the 2026-2027 School Year
Acceptance of the Redwood City Teachers Association’s Sunshine Proposal
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.10 (Acceptance of the Redwood City Teachers Association's Sunshine Proposal) was moved from its posted position to immediately after Public Comment (section 14), which placed it before the LCAP Mid Year Report presentation.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I move to approve the consent items. Second. All those in favor.

items.intro_words: Could you please do real quick? Thank you. Trustee wells.
Thank you. Trustee lee. Here. Trustee king.
Here. Vice president marcus. Here. President weekley is absent.
Thank you so much. Reporting on closed session.
The board unanimously voted not to hear the appeal regarding the complaint.
The board unanimously voted not to hear the appeal regarding the complaint.
Presented again. Welcome, everyone, to another Redwood City school board meeting.
Presented again. Welcome, everyone, to another Redwood City school board meeting.
Presented again. Welcome, everyone, to another Redwood City school board meeting.

Welcome, everyone, to another Redwood City school board meeting. Buenas noches a todos los quesana qui?
Are we doing a pledge of allegiance? We don't. Okay, so we're skipping the Pledge of Allegiance. Are there any changes to the agenda?
Can I please get a motion to approve the agenda? Y' all move to approve the amended agenda.
Okay, so moving on to public comments, we have a few speaker cards, and the first one would be Brianna Gear.
So the next item here is labor association comments. Do we have any?
Thank you. Good evening, board Dr. Baker, cabinet members and members of our school district community.
And the next item, the agenda again we moved item 13.10 to right after this. So that would be acceptance of the RID City Teachers Association Sunshine proposal.
So the next item on the agenda it is now schools community reports presentation on the local accountability plan LCAP midyear report.
So we have a hand on zoom. Wendy brown, Can you guys hear me?
So, questions? Are there any questions? Comments? I mean pretty positive.
And with that, we move Forward with Item 12, Approval of Consent items.
And under action items, number one is a submission of 2026 California School Board Association, CSBA delegate assembly nomination.
Moving to item 13.2, adoption of resolution number 17, reduction or elimination of certificated services for fiscal year 2025, 2026.
And then now. 13.3. Adoption of Resolution Number 18, Release and Reassignment of certificated administrators.
13.4. Adoption of resolution number 19, determination of order of employment for certificated employees for elimination of or reduction in particular kinds of services for fiscal year 2025, 2026.
13.5. Adoption of resolution number 20, reduction of certain classified services for fiscal year 2025, 2026.
13.6. Approval of non reelection of certificated provisionary personnel.
13.7. Approval of release of temporary teachers. So each year as temporary contracts are written for employees, they have an end date.
Now 13.8. Approval of personnel changes for the 2025, 2026 school year.
And item 13.9, receipt of governing boards initial proposal for negotiations with Red City Teachers association for the 2026. 2027 school year.
And now on to board and superintendent reports. No. Isn't there one more?
And now on to board and superintendent reports. No. Isn't there one more?
Is there any correspondence? Great. Other business, suggested items for future agenda?
Great. Other business, suggested items for future agenda? No. Okay. And board reflection.
Great. Other business, suggested items for future agenda? No. Okay. And board reflection.
Any changes to the meeting calendar? Yes. So it seems the February 26th closed session will not be needed.
And with that, does somebody want to make a motion to adjourn the meeting?
